strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong testing/TDD background with workshops, talks, and craftsmanship focus
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Limited recent Kotlin/Java exposure; backend secondary stack not demonstrated
Cloud platform experience narrow (AWS CDK only); no GCP/Azure or Kubernetes depth shown beyond GISCollective
response.justification: The candidate brings well over a decade of full-stack engineering with a strong TypeScript/Node.js/React core, demonstrated AI-agent and MCP tooling experience, and a clear testing/craftsmanship orientation that aligns with the role's stack and quality expectations. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js usage, limited recent Kotlin/Java work, and shallow coverage of cloud/Kubernetes beyond AWS CDK, which are relevant for the secondary stack and infrastructure responsibilities.
